name: Christmas Fruitcake Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the oil and sugar.
2. Add the egg to the mixture.
3. Blend in the remaining ingredients until well combined.
4. Drop by spoonfuls onto a lightly oiled baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes.
6. Cool on a wire rack.
7. Store in a tightly closed container.
1 cookie contains approximately 77 calories, 1 fruit exchange, 1 fat exchange (9 grams), 9 grams of carbohydrates, 1 gram of protein, 4 grams of fat (7 mg sodium, 70 mg potassium, and 8 mg cholesterol).
Source: American Diabetes Association Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman, 1986. Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier in November 1993.
